passage:
Dear Valued Customer,

We are writing to inform you that our store will be undergoing renovations from March 15 to April 30. During this period, our ground floor will be closed to the public. However, our second floor and online services will remain fully operational.

We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause. All existing orders will be processed as normal, and our customer service team is available to assist you with any questions.

We look forward to welcoming you to our newly renovated space in May.

Sincerely,
The Management Team

questions.text: What is the purpose of this letter?
questions.explanation: Thư thông báo về việc tu sửa cửa hàng.

questions.text: Which part of the store will be closed?
questions.explanation: Tầng trệt sẽ đóng cửa.

questions.text: When will the renovations be completed?
questions.explanation: Sẽ mở cửa trở lại vào tháng 5.

passage:
MEMORANDUM

To: All Staff
From: Human Resources Department
Date: January 10, 2024
Subject: Annual Performance Reviews

Please be reminded that annual performance reviews will take place from February 1 to February 28. Your manager will schedule a one-on-one meeting with you during this period.

Before your review, please complete the self-assessment form available on the company intranet. This should be submitted to your manager at least three days before your scheduled meeting.

If you have any questions about the review process, please contact the HR department at extension 2500.

Thank you for your cooperation.

- Bachelor's degree in Marketing or related field
- 2+ years of marketing experience

We offer competitive salary, health benefits, and opportunities for professional development.

passage:
Annual Report Excerpt — Meridian Corporation

Fiscal Year 2023 Highlights

Meridian Corporation achieved record revenue of $2.3 billion in fiscal year 2023, representing a 12% increase over the previous year. This growth was driven primarily by our expansion into Asian markets, which now account for 35% of total revenue.

Our operating margin improved to 18.5%, up from 16.2% in 2022, reflecting successful cost optimization initiatives. Net income reached $425 million, a 15% year-over-year increase.

Looking ahead, we project revenue growth of 10-14% for fiscal year 2024, supported by ongoing investments in research and development.

questions.text: What was Meridian's total revenue in 2023?
questions.explanation: Doanh thu 2023 là 2,3 tỷ đô la.

questions.text: What percentage of revenue comes from Asian markets?
questions.explanation: Thị trường châu Á chiếm 35%.

questions.text: What is the projected revenue growth for 2024?
questions.explanation: Dự kiến tăng trưởng 10-14%.

The global electric vehicle market is projected to reach $800 billion by 2027, growing at a CAGR of 22%. Key factors driving this growth include government incentives, declining battery costs, and increasing environmental awareness.

China leads the market with 50% of global EV sales, followed by Europe (25%) and North America (18%).

Product Return Policy

At TechGadgets, we want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. If you are not satisfied, you may return most items within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

Return Conditions:
- Items must be in original packaging
- Receipt or proof of purchase required
- Electronics must be unopened or defective
- Software cannot be returned once opened

Refund Method:
- Credit card purchases: refund to original card
- Cash purchases: refund in cash
- Gift card purchases: refund to gift card

For online purchases, please contact our customer service at support@techgadgets.com to initiate a return.

Effective January 1, 2024, employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week with manager approval. Guidelines:

- Manager must approve remote work schedule

Violations may result in revocation of remote work privileges.

passage:
Business Travel Policy Update

New travel guidelines effective March 1, 2024:

Air Travel:
- Economy class for flights under 4 hours
- Business class for flights over 4 hours
- Advance booking required (minimum 14 days)

Accommodation:
- Up to $200/night for domestic travel
- Up to $350/night for international travel
- Preferred hotel chain: Marriott

Expenses:
- Meals: $75/day maximum
- Ground transportation: Receipts required
- Internet: Reimbursable up to $10/day

All expenses must be submitted within 30 days of travel.

questions.text: What class is required for flights under 4 hours?
questions.explanation: Chuyến bay dưới 4 giờ đi hạng Economy.

questions.text: What is the hotel limit for international travel?
questions.explanation: Giới hạn khách sạn quốc tế là $350/đêm.

questions.text: How long do employees have to submit expenses?
questions.explanation: Nhân viên có 30 ngày để nộp chi phí.

passage:
Product Warranty Information

Standard Warranty: 1 year from date of purchase
Extended Warranty: Available for purchase (additional 2 years)

What's Covered:
- Manufacturing defects
- Hardware failures
- Battery issues (first year only)

What's NOT Covered:
- Physical damage
- Water damage
- Unauthorized modifications
- Normal wear and tear

Warranty Claims:
1. Contact customer support
2. Provide proof of purchase
3. Ship product to designated center
4. Allow 5-7 business days for repair

For warranty inquiries: warranty@techstore.com

questions.text: How long is the standard warranty?
questions.explanation: Bảo hành tiêu chuẩn là 1 năm.

questions.text: What is NOT covered under warranty?
questions.explanation: Thiệt hại vật lý không được bảo hành.

questions.text: How long does repair take?
questions.explanation: Sửa chữa mất 5-7 ngày làm việc.
